title: A Poisoned Arrow
text:
## Chapter One

At Sāvatthī. “Possessions, honor, and popularity are grim … Let whom be pierced by a poisoned arrow? Let possessions, honor, and popularity come to a trainee who has not achieved their heart’s desire.

‘Arrow’ is a term for possessions, honor, and popularity. So grim are possessions, honor, and popularity. …”
